title: rubus henryi
intro: Rubus henryi, also known as the Chinese raspberry or Henry's raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus henryi include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antibacterial agent. Rubus henryi is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, and is also consumed as a fruit or used in jams and preserves.
